title: Community Health Worker
description: Kaiser Permanente seeks Community Health Workers to strengthen health equity in Baltimore and surrounding communities. You'll work hybrid across community centers and offices, providing health education, connecting patients with resources, and advocating for health access. This role offers meaningful impact in a healthcare organization committed to the health of its communities and members.
responsibilities: Develop and deliver culturally tailored health education programs on chronic disease management, prevention, and wellness
Engage with community members to assess health needs and barriers; build trust and relationships across diverse populations
Connect individuals to Kaiser Permanente services, insurance programs, and community resources
Collect and report data on community health outcomes and program participation to drive continuous improvement
Support health equity initiatives and work collaboratively with clinical and community teams

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; Community Health Worker certification preferred

benefits: Kaiser Permanente medical, dental, and vision coverage
